title: conyza ruderalis
intro: Conyza ruderalis, also known as buttonweed, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Conyza ruderalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions such as arthritis, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Conyza ruderalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
